top_signals.title: Trafigura Withdraws Huge Volumes of Copper From LME Warehouses
top_signals.summary: Trafigura Group has moved to withdraw hundreds of millions of dollars of copper from London Metal Exchange warehouses as lucrative trading opportunities emerge in the US and China, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
